[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00110101 4
1 11011000 4
2 10100010 3
3 01001010 3
4 01101000 3
5 00110100 3
6 11011110 6
7 11110010 5

01 00001110 3
12 01000000 1
23 00100000 1

45 01000010 2
56 00100000 1
67 10001100 3
70 00000001 1

02 00001010 2
13 01000000 1
24 00110100 3 match 5
35 00010110 3
46 01000010 2
57 10101000 3
60 00000001 1
71 00000001 1

14 00010000 1

72 00000001 1
